hero.headline: Manage and rent your creative spaces without friction
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform for music studios, DJ rooms, cycloramas, and podcast rooms. Online bookings, smart calendar, and dashboard — all in one place.

features.title: Everything you need to manage your studio
features.subtitle: Tools designed for creative space owners in Chile

multiLocation.title: Multiple locations
multiLocation.description: Manage all your venues from a single dashboard. Each location with its own resources and schedules.

onlineBooking.title: Online bookings 24/7
onlineBooking.description: Your clients book directly from your custom page. No calls, no WhatsApp.

calendar.title: Calendar & availability
calendar.description: Set schedules per resource, block dates, and prevent double-bookings automatically.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: View bookings, revenue, and occupancy in real time. Make data-driven decisions.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.description: Sign up for free and set up your business profile in under 2 minutes.

step2.title: Configure your spaces
step2.description: Add your locations, resources (rooms, equipment) and set availability schedules.

step3.title: Receive bookings
step3.description: Share your booking link and start receiving clients. It's that simple.

testimonial1.quote: We stopped losing bookings through WhatsApp. Now everything is recorded and organized.
testimonial1.author: Camila Rojas

testimonial2.quote: The calendar prevents double-bookings that used to be a constant headache.
testimonial2.author: Sebastián Muñoz

testimonial3.quote: In one week we had everything set up. The platform is super intuitive.
testimonial3.author: Valentina Torres

finalCta.title: Ready to professionalize your studio?
finalCta.subtitle: Join the creative studios already managing their bookings with Bukarrum.

pricing.title: Simple plans, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your studio. All plans include email support.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Ideal for studios with a single location

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For growing studios with multiple locations

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large-scale operations with no limits

items.question: Can I change plans later?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your settings.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: We accept credit and debit card payments through MercadoPago. Billing is monthly or annual based on your preference.

items.question: What happens if I exceed the booking limit?
items.answer: We'll notify you when you're close to the limit. You can upgrade to keep receiving bookings without interruption.

items.question: Can I cancel at any time?
items.answer: Yes, no minimum commitment. If you cancel, you keep access until the end of your paid period.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Have questions or need a personalized demo? Write to us and we'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your studio and what you need...
contact.successMessage: Thanks for contacting us. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.description: The booking management platform for creative spaces in Chile.
